mechanism: user-level systemd oneshot service and persistent timer
recovery: A failed oneshot remains evidenced in the cycle ledger; the next persistent timer run rebuilds verified cursors and catches up without backdating.
path_policy: Committed templates contain no machine-specific absolute path; installer-generated uncommitted user units may contain the actual checkout, binary, activation, and data paths.
secret_policy: Unit files and logs contain no credentials or secret environment variables; collector has no credential inputs.
logging_policy: stdout/stderr are retained by the user journal and status reports contain collection health only.
single_instance: An exclusive nonblocking flock under runtime state rejects concurrent collectors.
